channel.title: maGaming RSS Feed - insider-gaming.com
channel.description: A cleaned-up version of the original gaming feed for insider-gaming.com

item.title: Will Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced Be On Xbox Game Pass?
item.content:encoded:
Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced is finally on its way, and plenty of you out there must be wondering if it will arrive on Xbox Game Pass—after all, who wouldn’t love to pick up the remake for free?

Xbox Game Pass has been the centre of attention lately, with talks of new tiers and reduced prices for Ultimate and PC subscribers. With Xbox clearly wanting to make Game Pass the place to play, adding Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced to the service would certainly be a huge step in that direction.

But is that on the cards, or will you be forced to buy it at full price? The answers are down below.

Will You Be Able To Play Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced On Xbox Game Pass?

Unfortunately, Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced is not being advertised as an Xbox Game Pass inclusion, with everything pointing towards the title not being a day-one arrival in the catalogue.

It’s a crying shame, as it’d be an excellent addition to the hundreds of games already available on the service. But it’s clear that Ubisoft think Black Flag Resynced can stand on its own two feet, and based on the hype surrounding the game, they’re probably right.

  • More Insider Gaming: Will Assassin’s Creed: Black Flag Resynced Have DLC Or Multiplayer?

With all the combat changes and collector’s edition, it’s likely Ubisoft want to encourage people to buy the game day one, instead of relying on a subscription service like Xbox Game Pass. However, that doesn’t mean the game’s future is set in stone…

Will Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced Ever Come To Xbox Game Pass?

Never say never, as Assassin’s Creed titles have a long history of arriving on Xbox Game Pass, though it’s just not alongside their launch dates.

At the time of writing, tons of Assassin’s Creed titles are available on Xbox Game Pass Ultimate, thanks to its partnered subscription to Ubisoft+. That grants you access to a whole variety of Assassin’s Creed games, ranging from some of the more recent titles, like Valhalla and Mirage, to some of the classics, like Unity or Brotherhood.

  • More Insider Gaming: Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced Platforms, Explained

In fact, you can even play the original Assassin’s Creed Black Flag on there right now! So, if you can’t wait for the remake and want to dive into the game, you can always cash in an Ultimate Game Pass subscription and set sail right away.

But, if you want to experience the remake for all of its updates and additions, it looks like you’ll have to buy the game day one, or wait a good while for it to potentially arrive on Game Pass in the distant future.

Will you be playing Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced when it releases? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more Assassin’s Creed coverage, check out some of the following:

  • Don’t Worry, Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced Isn’t An RPG
  • Edward Kenway’s Voice Actor Returns For Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion

MOBILE APP

item.title: Saros Reviews Make It A GOTY Contender
item.content:encoded:
Housemarque has done it again (pretends to be shocked) and released another banger. Saros is the latest and greatest AAA title from the developer, and its reviews will be encouraging to anyone considering purchasing it.

If you’ve been following Housemarque for years like me, you already know what you’re getting: Spellbinding visuals, engaging and frenetic gameplay, and a cauldron of game mechanics intertwining together to make a memorable experience. With an extensive portfolio behind the developer, Returnal was a small step forward, and reviews suggest Saros is another huge leap for mankind.

At the time of writing, Saros has a Metacritic score of 88/100 based on 86 reviews on the PS5—not that there are any other Saros platforms available, mind.

The game has a litany of 10s and 100s. Saros has multiple maximum scores, and 95% of the reviews are considered ‘Positive,’ with only 5% ‘Mixed,’ and none as ‘Negative.’

For comparison, Returnal’s Metacritic score is 86/100, suggesting that Saros is the promised improvement.

If we throw Opencritic into the mix, then Saros has a 91 score, with a ‘Critics Recommend’ score of 95%.

Obviously, critical opinion doesn’t always mean everything, as we journalists can vary, but the consensus for Saros is a hugely positive one. This puts it just behind Resident Evil Requiem and Pokémon Pokopia for the best-rated games of 2026, and level with Mewgenics.

Saros is well and truly a GOTY contender, sure to be nominated for multiple categories at The Game Awards 2026.

Have Saros’ reviews convinced you to pick up the game? Or were you always going to buy it no matter what? Let us know your thoughts on Saros and Housemarque through our free-to-join Insider Gaming Discord.

Check out Xbox reevaluating its approach to exclusivity, and the Assassin’s Creed Black Flag Resynced PC System Requirements being revealed for more news.

Written by

Evergreen Editor

Andy is Insider Gaming's Senior Evergreen Editor and has been in the games journalism sphere in one way or another for over 7 years. His video game taste is as…

More from Andrew Highton

item.title: Forza Horizon 6 Premium Edition: Price, All Content & Is It Worth It?
item.content:encoded:
Forza Horizon 6 is racing onto the scene and stands as one of the biggest Xbox releases in 2026, with the franchise showcasing the long-awaited focus on Japan, and the Premium Edition is packed full of extra content.

The sixth entry in the Forza Horizon franchise is expected to make waves, following on from the extremely successful release of Forza Horizon 5 on PlayStation, which joins the race later this year.

If you’re considering splashing out on the Forza Horizon 6 Premium Edition but want to know how much bang you will get for your buck, Insider Gaming has the breakdown.

Forza Horizon 6 Premium Edition Price

The Premium Edition of Forza Horizon 6 is priced at a lofty $119.99/£109.99, but it’s packed with additional content for the price.

Purchasing the Premium Edition provides access to pretty much everything Forza Horizon 6 has to offer, both now and in the future, but there are ways to reduce the price.

  • More Insider Gaming: Does Forza Horizon 6 Have Early Access?

If you have an active Xbox Game Pass Ultimate or PC Game Pass subscription, you already have access to the Standard Edition of the game and won’t have to fork out the full price to bump up to the Premium Edition.

A Premium Edition upgrade is available to purchase separately for $69.99/£59.99, unlocking all of the additional content.

All Forza Horizon 6 Premium Edition Content, Explained

The main benefits of the Premium Edition are up to four days of early access, and both post-launch DLC packs, when they are released.

No details of the Forza Horizon 6 DLC plans have been shared yet, but fans can expect plenty of content, with previous games including collabs with the likes of Hot Wheels and LEGO.

Additionally, the Premium Edition includes VIP Membership, providing a 2x Credit Boost to race rewards, three Forza Edition cars, a weekly bonus Super Wheelspin, special vanity items, and the Tokyo City house, along with five special pre-tuned cars at launch as another bonus through the Welcome Pack.

The garages of Premium Edition owners will be bolstered, as the version also includes the Car Pass, distributing 30 additional cars, once per week, eight cars in the Time Attack Car Pack, and four more cars in the Italian Passion Car Pack.

Is the Forza Horizon 6 Premium Edition Worth It?

For diehard fans of the franchise, the Forza Horizon 6 Premium Edition is certainly worth the outlay, as it provides pretty much everything you could want.

The array of cars includes a variety of vehicles to get behind as you explore Japan, and four days of early access reduces the wait time before you can dive into the game.

  • More Insider Gaming: Is Forza Horizon 6 on Xbox Game Pass?

The inclusion of both DLC packs is arguably the biggest benefit, however, as it saves you from forking out extra money later down the line, and the same is the case for the car packs.

In previous games, DLC packs have cost $14.99 each at launch, with the Car Pass costing an additional $29.99, VIP Membership priced at $14.99, and Car Packs ranging in price from $3.99 to $7.99.

If the prices remain the same for Forza Horizon 6, the Premium Edition can save you over $40 in the long run, but the good news is you don’t have to make a decision immediately and can upgrade later down the line.

Are you planning to splash out for the Premium Edition of Forza Horizon 6? Share your plans in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Forza Horizon 6, check out all the details on the exact release date and start time, and take a look at the full achievement list.

MOBILE APP

item.title: Shopify Rebellion Gold’s meL Steps Away From Competing in 2026
item.content:encoded:
Melanie ‘meL’ Capone, a hugely respected figure in the Game Changers space, has stated on social media that she will not be competing for the remainder of 2026. In an announcement paired with a lengthy explanation, meL stated that her withdrawal from the competitive scene is driven by her ongoing challenges with her mental health.

Speaking transparently, meL revealed a diagnosis of Major Depressive Disorder and stressed that she’s been undergoing therapy since August of last year.

meL Puts Mental Health First in Withdrawal Move

In an open statement on social media, meL revealed severe mental health symptoms, including suicidal ideation and a complete loss of motivation and self-care. She admitted that just continuing to play at the highest level required immense emotional effort, leading her to constantly mask how she truly felt to keep up appearances.

She explained:

I believe the best course of action is for me to step away from competing in order to give myself the best chance ot repair my mental health. This would also give my team the ability to play with someone who can commit to giving 100%, which I cannot do in this state.

It’s a huge step to withdraw from actively competing for more than six months, but meL believes it’s the most natural course of action. But it doesn’t mean she’s preparing to disappear from the scene entirely:

Not competing for the next six months will be a big adjustment for me. But the silver lining is it will hopefully let me co-stream more often, attend live events, appear on the VCT desk, and take on other opportunities that previously conflicted with my busy schedule. The bottom line is I will remain very active in VALORANT.

The comments under the social media post were laden with supportive statements, with even the VCT team taking the time to respond:

Let us know what you think about this news over on the Insider Gaming Discord server.

For more Insider Gaming coverage, check out the news that Neityu is standing in for Karrigan

Senior Editor and Esports Lead

Grant has been gaming for 30+ years and in the industry for 10+. You'll probably find him playing a post-apocalyptic game or an extraction shooter somewhere.

More from Grant Taylor-Hill

MOBILE APP

item.title: All NTE: Neverness to Everness Codes & How to Redeem Them
item.content:encoded:
Neverness to Everness has attracted the attention of millions of players across the globe, and as has become customary with gacha games, there’s a slew of codes to redeem for free rewards.

Releasing April 29, Neverness to Everness is a free-to-play gacha title from Chinese developer Perfect World, offering GTA Online-like elements, and over 35 million pre-registrations have been secured.

If you want to ensure you get everything you possibly can for free in Neverness to Everness, Insider Gaming has all the active codes and how to redeem them.

All Active Neverness to Everness Codes

There are currently three active Neverness to Everness codes to claim at launch, with more expected to be added to mark major milestones post-release.

Titles like Neverness to Everness regularly release redeemable codes after hitting a set number of active players, and to celebrate events in-game.

  • More Insider Gaming: Is NTE: Neverness to Everness on PlayStation, Xbox & PC? All Platforms, Explained

As such, it’s worth bookmarking this page and regularly checking back to ensure you never miss out on codes, as this article will be updated regularly.

The table below outlines all of the available codes for Neverness to Everness, alongside the rewards they provide and their expiration dates.

How to Redeem Neverness to Everness Codes

Neverness to Everness codes can only be redeemed from directly within the game, so you can’t claim the rewards if you’re not signed in via the launcher.

The game is available on mobile, however, so you will be able to redeem codes on the go if you’re away from your console or PC, ensuring you don’t miss out.

  • More Insider Gaming: Neverness to Everness Pre-Download Guide—How to Preload & File Sizes Explained

Here’s a step-by-step guide on the process to redeem codes in Neverness to Everness.

  1. Launch Neverness to Everness and sign in to the game.
  2. Select the ‘Menu’ button in the top-right corner of the screen.
  3. Now hit the ‘…’ button.
  4. Click the ‘Redeem Code’ option
  5. Enter the code you want to redeem, and claim your rewards

Are you excited for Neverness to Everness? Share your hopes for the game in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Neverness to Everness, find out about the game’s multiplayer features, and check the exact start time for launch.

MOBILE APP

Level Up Your Gaming News

Real-time news, exclusive podcasts, push alerts, and a better reading experience.

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: All NTE: Neverness to Everness Pre-Registration Rewards & How to Get Them
item.content:encoded:
A slew of big titles are releasing in the next month, which could stretch your bank accounts, but Neverness to Everness offers some hope with a free-to-play model, and a host of pre-registration rewards are available.

Neverness to Everness launches on April 29 and has attracted vast attention pre-launch, with millions of players across the world eagerly awaiting the launch of the Gacha title.

A huge chunk have already qualified for pre-registration rewards, and with Insider Gaming’s help, you can join them.

All Neverness to Everness Pre-Registration Rewards

There are five pre-registration rewards available in Neverness to Everness, alongside an additional reward for a social media milestone.

Gamers around the world have united to unlock the full slew of available pre-registration rewards, with over 35 million users resulting in an influx of bonuses for those who registered.

  • More Insider Gaming: Is NTE: Neverness to Everness on PlayStation, Xbox & PC? All Platforms, Explained

Additionally, the official account followers of Neverness to Everness on social media have unlocked an additional reward, providing players with even more freebies.

The table below shows all of the Neverness to Everness Pre-Registration rewards, along with the community landmarks and other requirements for obtaining.

How to Get Neverness to Everness Pre-Registration Rewards

To earn pre-registration rewards in Neverness to Everness, players must pre-register for the title on the official website.

The process doesn’t take long, and once completed, the available rewards will be distributed via the in-game mailbox at launch.

  • More Insider Gaming: Neverness to Everness Pre-Download Guide—How to Preload & File Sizes Explained

Here’s the step-by-step process to pre-registration.

  1. Head to the official Neverness to Everness website.
  2. Hit the ‘Preregister Now’ button at the top of the page.
  3. Complete the steps outlined.
  4. After launch, claim the rewards through the in-game Mailbox.

You may have to complete early parts of the game to unlock features like the Mailbox, but it shouldn’t take too much time, based on similar titles.

Are you excited for Neverness to Everness? Share your hopes for the game in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Neverness to Everness, find out about the game’s multiplayer features, and check the exact start time for launch.

MOBILE APP

Available on iOS & Android

item.title: Pokémon Pokopia Sableye’s Gem Hunt Event: Release Date, Start Times & All Content
item.content:encoded:
Pokémon Pokopia continues to bring new content post-launch, and a new event is on the horizon, introducing Sableye to the game, along with fresh items.

Pokopia’s widely successful launch has opened the door for continued content drops, with fans hoping that full DLC will be available later down the line, and it’s clear there are plans for fresh content, with Sableye set to become the fourth post-launch addition to the roster.

If you’re excited for the Pokémon Pokopia Sableye’s Gem Hunt event and want all the details on when it kicks off, Insider Gaming has you covered.

When is The Pokémon Pokopia Sableye’s Gem Hunt Event?

The Sableye’s Gem Hunt Event in Pokémon Pokopia kicks off on April 29, 2026, running through to a conclusion on May 14.

This marks the third post-launch event for Pokopia, following on from an event that introduced Hoppip, Skiploom, and Jumpluff to the game, and an April Fool’s event with an Inflatable Sudowoodo reward.

  • More Insider Gaming: All Pokémon in Pokopia & How to Get Them

Like the previous events, the content is actually available now if you time skip on your console by setting your time and date to be within these periods, but there’s no real benefit to unlocking the content early.

Given that the event is also due to run for an extensive period of time, you won’t need to rush through it, so the best approach is to just wait until launch.

What Time Does the Pokémon Pokopia Sableye’s Gem Hunt Event Start?

The Pokémon Pokopia Sableye’s Gem Hunt event begins at 5 AM local time on April 29, running for over two weeks.

As the event has a set structure with a staggered start time globally, you won’t need to wait for an awkward time in your location. Instead, it will be available on April 29 as long as you log in after 5 AM.

In total, the event runs for over two weeks, ending at 04:59 AM local time on May 14. After this date has passed, content from the event will be unavailable.

However, you may be able to re-access the event content by changing your console time and date back to the event period, though this won’t be confirmed until after the event concludes.

All Content in the Pokémon Pokopia Sableye’s Gem Hunt Event

The main highlight of the Sableye’s Gem Hunt Event in Pokémon Pokopia is the introduction of Sableye to the roster, adding a fourth event-exclusive Pokémon to the game.

Sableye will come alongside a new habitat and several new items, including camping-themed decorations and buildings, like a Tent Kit, Sleeping Bag, Camping Chair, and Digital Camera.

  • More Insider Gaming: All Pokopia Pokémon Habitats & How to Make Them

Similar to the Hoppip event, new items will be obtained by exchanging event-specific currency, in this case, Red Crystal Fragments. Items will be purchaseable through the shop inside any rebuilt Pokémon Center.

If you miss out on any rewards or want extra, even after the event has passed, you can use the camera function and the 3D printer to replicate the item.

What other Pokémon do you want to see added through events in Pokopia? Share your thoughts in the Insider Gaming Discord.

For more Pokémon Pokopia, find out what happened to the humans in the game, and learn what to do with Rainbow Feathers.

MOBILE APP

item.title: Today’s Contexto: Hints & Answer For April 24, 2026
item.content:encoded:
Contexto is a word association game that gives you a new word to guess every single day. With every attempt, the AI algorithm determines how close your guess is to the daily answer based on thematic and contextual similarity.

Sometimes, though, no matter how experienced you are, the word you’re looking for can be incredibly vague and hard to deduce. Luckily for you, this guide is full of hints to give you a helping hand, but make sure you give today’s Contexto a go if you haven’t already!

How To Play Contexto

Contexto is incredibly simple to play, but difficult to master. All you have to do is type words into the search bar, and the AI algorithm will tell you how close your word is to the answer.

You’ll know how close your guess is based on the colour of the bar and the number next to it.

  • Red includes guesses with the number 1,501 and above, meaning you’re way off from the secret word.
  • Orange includes guesses between 301 and 1,500, meaning you’re getting closer, but still some ways off.
  • Green includes guesses between 1 and 300, meaning you’re on the right track.

Best Contexto Tips & Tricks

  • Start off using broad terms, then narrow down once you’ve got under the 1,000 mark.
  • Try using Nouns first, and dip into verbs or adjectives once you’ve discovered the context.
  • Experiment with random words at times, especially as different forms of a root word can rank differently, such as work and worker.
  • Guess away, as unlike other word games like Wordle, you aren’t limited to a strict number of attempts.

Best Starting Words For Contexto

Here are some great starting words to get you going with Contexto:

  • Thing
  • Person
  • Place
  • Animal
  • Work
  • Nature
  • Game
  • Concept
  • Idea
  • Food

Contexto Hints For Today, April 24, 2026

Without giving away today’s Contexto answer, here are a few helpful hints to get you thinking in the right direction:

  • Hint 1: Creamy-white material
  • Hint 2: Found in tusks
  • Hint 3: _____ Coast

If they don’t help, then here are the nine closest words, going from tenth to second:

  • Turquoise
  • Bronze
  • Rug
  • Satin
  • Mauve
  • Burgundy
  • Silk
  • Taupe
  • Beige

Today’s Contexto Answer For April 24, 2026

If you’ve tried everything and still can’t figure out today’s Contexto answer, then you can find it down below:

Answer: Ivory

Ivory is the hard, creamy-white modified dentine that composes the tusks of a tusked animal, like an elephant or a walrus.

When Is The Next Contexto Game?

Contexto is updated daily at 12 AM or Midnight in your respective time zone, meaning the next game will start on April 25.

The Contexto schedule is very consistent, with a new game releasing at the same time every day.

How did you find today’s Contexto? Share your thoughts in the official Insider Gaming Discord Server.

For more word game guides, check out the following:

  • NYT Connections
  • Wordle

Charlie is one of Insider Gaming's Guides Writers who's been in the gaming industry for a little over a year. Unfortunately for him, he enjoys every video game genre out…

More from Charlie Champion
